zh.lifeSummary: 當Drogo de Baalon於大約1024年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特巴隆時，他的父親Osmund De Baalun39歲，母親Mrs Osmund de Baalun40歲。他於大約1060年與Eunice Mary在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1069年在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Drogo de Baalon于大约1024年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特巴隆时，他的父亲Osmund De Baalun39岁，母亲Mrs Osmund de Baalun40岁。他于大约1060年与Eunice Mary在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1069年在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baalon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Sergio, Alfonso, Cesar, Conchita, Emigdio, Enrique, Felipe, Francisco, Jose Luis, Julio, Ruben.  Jewish Hyman, Isadore.

French and English (Middlesex): from the Old French personal name Ballon, Ballun, derived from the oblique stem of ancient Germanic Ballo, a short form of compound names based on the element bal, presumably meaning ‘torment, spitefulness’ (see Ballard ).

variants.name: Ballard
meanings: English: from Middle English ballard ‘bald-headed man’ (compare Bald 3).
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Balhard, composed of the elements bal, presumably meaning ‘torment, spitefulness’, and hard ‘hard, strong’. Compare Ballor .

variants.name: Ballam
meanings: English (Dorset): variant of Balaam (assimilated by folk etymology to the Biblical personal name Balaam, see Numbers 23–24), which is a habitational name from Baylham in Suffolk or a Norman surname derived from Ballon in Le Mans, Sarthe, France (compare Ballon ). The surname may also be a variant of English Balham, perhaps from Balham in Streatham, Surrey, named with Old English bealg ‘smooth’ or ‘round’ + hamm ‘water meadow, land hemmed in by water’.

nameMeanings.name: Drogo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin but uncertain meaning and derivation. Norman given names are most often of Continental Germanic derivation, and this one is possibly ultimately from Old Saxon drog ‘ghost, phantom’, or perhaps from Old High German tragen ‘to carry’. However, most plausible is the suggestion that it was brought into Germanic from Slavic as a short form of a name formed with dorogo ‘dear’.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Drogo de Baalon was born about 1024, in Ballon, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Osmund De Baalun, was 39 and his mother, Mrs Osmund de Baalun, was 40. He married Eunice Mary about 1060, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1069, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 46.

Il a épousé Eunice Mary environ 1060, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1069, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Drogo de Baalon(이)가 대략 1024년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 바런에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osmund De Baalun(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Osmund de Baalun(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1060년 프랑스에서 Eunice Mary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1069년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Drogo de Baalon nasceu aproximadamente 1024, em Ballon, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Osmund De Baalun, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Osmund de Baalun, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Eunice Mary aproximadamente 1060, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1069, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Drogo de Baalon родился около 1024 г. в местности баллон, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Osmund De Baalun было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Osmund de Baalun, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Eunice Mary около 1060 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1069 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.
